category_sources: Official GitHub README describes timedog as showing files saved for Time Machine backups.
source_facts.description says it lists files saved by macOS Time Machine backups.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is nlfiedler/timedog and README heading is timedog.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, Time Machine network notes, file-access notes, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provided; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify macOS Time Machine backup file-listing behavior.
source_facts.executables lists timedog as a CLI executable.
